title: salvia distans
intro: Salvia distans, also known as blue sage or Siberian sage, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and China. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salvia distans include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-anxiety effects. Herbal preparations of Salvia distans often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea or using the dried leaves in a tincture or capsule form.
